---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition
labels: enhancement
---

**Before you write**: check [ROADMAP.md](../../blob/main/ROADMAP.md) and the
non-goals in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md). Non-goals
(multi-provider, dashboards, scaling, DB, caching, billing) will be declined
regardless of implementation quality — this saves your time, not ours.

**User story** (who is stuck, at which moment, and what would they be able
to do afterwards?)

**Why can't this be done outside sekimori?** (client-side, reverse proxy,
or by using LiteLLM instead)

**Does it require a new runtime dependency?** (the default answer to those
is no)
